items.name: Yamaha Red Racing Moto Jacket – Roblox Biker Fit
items.description:
For more t-shirts, pants and cross necklace you can check out my group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/408184655/L00KS#!/about


Fuel up your avatar with this Yamaha red and white racing jacket, featuring zip-up details, gritty textures, and bold motorsport branding. Perfect for Roblox biker gangs, racing roleplay, or street drift culture, this outfit captures the thrill of speed and the edge of asphalt style. Ideal for avatars who live life in the fast lane and dominate every digital racetrack in style.

items.name: Leather Satchel Bag With Straps
items.description:
Step out in style with the timeless Leather Satchel! Crafted with a classic design, this versatile bag exudes charm and practicality. Featuring detailed stitching, a secure flap closure, and adjustable straps, it's perfect for adventurers, scholars, or anyone on the go. Whether you're carrying ancient maps, rare artifacts, or just your essentials, this satchel adds a touch of vintage flair to any outfit.

Check out the Group and more items below:

https://www.roblox.com/groups/32517136/F-W-Quist#!/about
